zh.East Newton, Cambridge, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Nellison於1318年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親Peter Nellison26歲，母親MRS Peter Nellison22歲。她與Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1402年在英國越可爾享年84歲。

zh-hans.East Newton, Cambridge, England: 英国英格兰坎布利其爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Nellison于1318年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲Peter Nellison26岁，母亲MRS Peter Nellison22岁。她与Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1402年在英国越可爾享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nellison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: patronymic based on   Kelly   as a personal name.

variants.name: Kelly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Aileen, John Patrick, Siobhan, Liam, Brigid, Donovan, Eamon, Parnell, Aidan, Clancy.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceallaigh, or, in some areas, Mac Ceallaigh ‘descendant (or son) of Ceallach’, an ancient Irish personal name, originally a byname meaning ‘bright-headed’, later understood as ‘frequenting churches’ (Irish ceall). There are several early Irish saints who bore this name. Kelly is now the most common of all surnames in Ireland.

Scottish: habitational name from either the lands of Kelly, near Arbroath (Angus), Kellie in Carnbee (Fife), or Kelly in Methlick (Aberdeenshire). Each of these placenames is from Pictish celli or Gaelic coille ‘wood’ + the placename forming suffix -in. Alternatively, from the lands of Kelloe in the barony of Hume (Berwickshire), whose name is of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Nellison was born in 1318, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Peter Nellison, was 26 and her mother, MRS Peter Nellison, was 22. She married Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1402, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Nellison est née en 1318, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Nellison, avait 26 ans et sa mère, MRS Peter Nellison, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1402, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Nellison 1318 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Nellison 26 und ihre Mutter MRS Peter Nellison 22. Sie hat Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1402 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Nellison è nata il nel 1318 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Peter Nellison, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, MRS Peter Nellison, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1402, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Nellisonが1318年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Peter Nellisonは26歳，母MRS Peter Nellisonは22歳であった。Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1402年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Nellison(이)가 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Nellison(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 MRS Peter Nellison(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 요르크실르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Nellison nasceu em 1318, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Nellison, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, MRS Peter Nellison, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1402, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Nellison родилась в 1318 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Peter Nellison было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали MRS Peter Nellison, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1402 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Nellison nació en 1318, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter Nellison, tenía 26 años y su mamá, MRS Peter Nellison, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1402, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
